title: Classic Persia
description: The quintessential Iran itinerary covering the ancient capitals. From Tehran's bustling bazaars to Isfahan's turquoise domes, Yazd's windcatchers, and Shiraz's poetry gardens.

title: Golden Triangle
description: Iran's three jewels in one week. Hit the highlights of Tehran, Isfahan, and Shiraz without the rush.

title: Weekend in Isfahan
description: A focused deep-dive into Half of the World. Three days exploring Isfahan's legendary squares, bridges, and bazaars.

title: Desert & Stars
description: Sleep under desert skies, explore mud-brick villages, and discover the ancient Silk Road oases of Yazd and Kerman.

title: Northern Green
description: Escape to Iran's lush Caspian coast. Rice paddies, misty forests, seafood feasts, and traditional villages.

title: Kurdish Highlands
description: Explore western Iran's dramatic mountains, ancient rock carvings, and warm Kurdish hospitality.

title: Silk Road Explorer
description: Follow the ancient trade routes from Tehran through Tabriz, Isfahan, Yazd, and Kerman. The ultimate cultural immersion.

title: Pilgrimage Trail
description: Visit Iran's holiest sites from Qom to Mashhad. Stunning shrine architecture, spiritual experiences, and local traditions.
